message:
fix(concurrency): prevent goroutine leaks and improve thread safety

- events/bus.go: Add bounded concurrency (semaphore) to Publish and
  PublishSync to prevent unbounded goroutine spawning under load
- events/bus.go: Add defensive check in unsubscribe for empty slice
- tracker/tracker.go: Add bounded concurrency to RecordFileChanges
  to prevent goroutine accumulation during rapid file change tracking
- supervisor/supervisor.go: Deep copy slice fields in Status() to
  prevent data races with DaemonSpec's Args/HealthCmd/Env slices
- checkpoint/export.go: Add symlink-aware TOCTOU protection for
  import validation with isPathWithinDirResolved()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
